quiz.title: AP-Calculus BC: Unit 3 Quiz 8
quiz.subtitle: Comprehensive Limits вҖ” Trigonometry, Factorization, and Infinite Limits
quiz.subject: AP-Calculus BC

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to \infty} \frac{3x^2 - 2x + 1}{x^2 + 5x - 3}$
questions.explanation: Same degree (2), so limit = ratio of leading coefficients: 3/1 = 3

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to 1^+} \frac{x^2 - 1}{(x-1)^3}$
questions.explanation: Factor: $(x-1)(x+1)/(x-1)^3 = (x+1)/(x-1)^2$. As xвҶ’1вҒә, numeratorвҶ’2, denominatorвҶ’0вҒә вҶ’ вҲһ

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to -\infty} \frac{\sqrt{4x^2 + 1}}{2x - 3}$
questions.explanation: For xвҶ’-вҲһ, вҲҡ(4xВІ+1) = |2x|вҲҡ(1+1/4xВІ) = -2xвҲҡ(1+1/4xВІ). Expression = -2x/(2x) = -1 as xвҶ’-вҲһ

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to 0} \frac{\sin(x^2)}{1 - \cos x}$
questions.explanation: sin(xВІ) ~ xВІ, 1-cos x ~ xВІ/2, so ratio вҶ’ xВІ/(xВІ/2) = 2

questions.question: $\lim_{x \to \infty} (\sqrt{x^2 + 2x} - x) = $
questions.explanation: Multiply by conjugate: $(x^2+2x-x^2)/(\sqrt{x^2+2x}+x) = 2x/(\sqrt{x^2+2x}+x)$. Divide by x: $2/(\sqrt{1+2/x}+1) вҶ’ 2/2 = 1$

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to \frac{\pi}{2}} \frac{\cos x}{x - \frac{\pi}{2}}$
questions.explanation: Let h = x-ПҖ/2, then cos(ПҖ/2+h) = -sin h, so limit = -sin h/h вҶ’ -1

questions.question: $\lim_{x \to 0} \frac{e^{3x} - e^{-2x}}{\sin(5x)} = $
questions.explanation: As xвҶ’0, e^{3x}-1 ~ 3x and 1-e^{-2x} ~ 2x, so numerator ~ 3x+2x = 5x. Denominator sin(5x) ~ 5x. So limit ~ 5x/5x = 1

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to 2^-} \frac{|x-2|}{(x-2)^2}$
questions.explanation: As xвҶ’2вҒ», |x-2| = 2-x, so expression = (2-x)/(x-2)ВІ = 1/(2-x) вҶ’ вҲһ

questions.question: Evaluate $\lim_{x \to \infty} \left(1 + \frac{1}{2x}\right)^{4x}$
questions.explanation: This is 1^вҲһ form. Limit = e^(lim 4xВ·1/2x) = eВІ

scoreMessages.90: Exceptional! You've mastered all major limit techniques including trigonometry, factorization, and infinite limits.
scoreMessages.70: Excellent work! You handle complex mixed limit problems with confidence.
scoreMessages.50: Strong understanding! Focus on identifying which technique to apply in each situation.
scoreMessages.0: Review the fundamental limit techniques: trigonometric identities, algebraic factorization, and asymptotic analysis.
